title: Giornata Internazionale di Studi - Can the Damage of Destructive Polarization Be Repaired?
snippet: This page outlines a conference program including a presentation by Giada Marino, Bruna Almeida Paroni, and Fabio Giglietto (University of Urbino Carlo Bo) titled "The Brazilian Digital Battlefield: Investigating The Dynamics Of Political Information Campaigns In Post-Bolsonaro Era". The study investigates the dynamics of misinformation campaigns on Facebook in the context of Brazil's political shifts.
description: A conference program at the University of Urbino Carlo Bo lists a presentation by Giada Marino, Bruna Almeida Paroni, and Fabio Giglietto about misinformation campaigns on Facebook in Brazil after Bolsonaro's presidency.

title: How to Detect a Disinformation Campaign - Media Ecosystems Analysis Group
snippet: This article quotes Fabio Giglietto, associate professor at the University of Urbino, discussing his work in the field of misinformation and disinformation. He talks about coordinated inauthentic behavior and how actors adapt to social media platforms' attempts to crack down on it, referencing his research on COVID-19 misinformation in Italy.
description: This article/podcast from mediaecosystems.org quotes Fabio Giglietto, an associate professor at the University of Urbino, about his research on disinformation, specifically coordinated inauthentic behavior and COVID-19 misinformation in Italy.

title: Researchers meet to discuss DSA access to publicly available platform data
snippet: Fabio Giglietto, Professor at the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, Italy, is listed as one of the experts participating in a working meeting with ECAT and DG Connect to discuss access to platform data under the Digital Services Act (DSA) to study systemic risks in the EU. The expert group is expected to report on the outcomes of their research during 2026.
description: Fabio Giglietto, Professor at the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, is participating in a working meeting with ECAT and DG Connect to discuss access to platform data under the Digital Services Act (DSA) to study systemic risks in the EU.

title: Meet the speakers! - EUDTP 2025 - EuroTech Universities Alliance
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a speaker at the EuroTech Universities Alliance event. The page notes that he is a Professor of Internet Studies at the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, researches disinformation dynamics, and his work provides critical insights into the mechanisms of media manipulation. He is also listed as presenting on 'Implementation challenges and opportunities under DSA'.
description: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a speaker at the EuroTech Universities Alliance event (EUDTP 2025), which discusses digital technologies and policy. The page specifies his affiliation and research interests in disinformation dynamics, as well as his presentation on 'Implementation challenges and opportunities under DSA'.

title: L’articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook - Terzogiornale
Il Premio Rimini Mundi a sette ambasciatori del congressuale - lapiazzarimini.it
Il movimento religioso cinese che si è infiltrato in un gruppo Facebook urbinate - il Ducato
The persistence and resilience of misinformation in the face of fact checking - Vera.ai
snippet: This article discusses a project by vera.ai, facilitated by Fabio Giglietto, Massimo Terenzi, and Richard Rogers, which examined the persistence and resilience of misinformation on Facebook using a dataset of 38,099 stories flagged by fact-checkers. The project identified recurring themes in misinformation, such as scams and false news regarding Emmanuel Macron, and categorized health-related misinformation.
description: This article on Vera.ai discusses a project facilitated by Fabio Giglietto that examines the persistence of misinformation on Facebook, utilizing a dataset of fact-checked stories to identify recurring themes and categorize health-related misinformation.
